author: IGN YouTube
text:
Salvation Denied - Official Demo Launch Trailer
Take a look at the Demo Launch Trailer for Salvation Denied, a co-op building simulation game developed by Firevolt. Players will work together to build large constructions by using machinery and tools. Complete new challenges in Salvation Denied, launching in Fall 2026 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam), with a demo available now on Steam.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
007 First Light - All 92 Collectibles Locations
In this 007 First Light guide, we're showing where to find all 92 Collectibles, plus including the checkpoint and a timestamp for every single one of them. We have everything broken out by chapter and list how many Collectibles should be found in each one. You cannot miss any Collectibles, but once they're picked up, they do not show up again in these missions no matter when you found them or what save file you were using at the time -- they will all be in your Collectibles menu.

00:35 - Cruciform Key (Legacy)
01:24 - Iceland Postcard (Postcards)
02:11 - Satellite Part (Mementos)

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Why Now Is the Perfect Time for a Zelda: Ocarina of Time Remake
While we wait for the next big Legend of Zelda game - and live action Zelda movie - an Ocarina of Time remake couldn't have possibly arrived at a better time. 

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Odyssey - Official 'In Studio: Ludwig Göransson' Featurette (2026) Matt Damon, Anne Hathaway
Take a look at the 'In Studio: Ludwig Göransson' Featurette for The Odyssey, the latest mythological action retelling of Homer's tale from the mind of Christopher Nolan. Hear from the composer of the film, Ludwig Göransson, and Christopher Nolan on the creation of the soundtrack for the upcoming film. The Odyssey is in theaters on July 17.

Christopher Nolan’s next film, The Odyssey, is a mythic action epic shot across the world using brand new IMAX® film technology. The film brings Homer’s foundational saga to IMAX® film screens for the first time and opens in theaters everywhere on July 17, 2026. 

The Odyssey stars Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson and Lupita Nyong’o, with Zendaya and Charlize Theron.

The Odyssey is produced by Emma Thomas and Christopher Nolan for their company, Syncopy. The executive producer is Thomas Hayslip.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Godzilla Defense Force X - Official Reveal Trailer
Check out the Reveal Trailer for Godzilla Defense Force X, a strategy management mobile game developed by Mintrocket and Toho. Players will defend cities across the globe from the menacing Kaiju by tactically placing bases and wielding powerful weapons on the front lines. Save the city in Godzilla Defense Force X, coming soon to iOS and Android.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Sepak U: Sports Fighting Game - Official Gameplay Trailer
Take a look at gameplay from Sepak U: Sports Fighting Game in this trailer for the upcoming Smash-like volleyball game, where fighting game meets volleyball and football with 1-4 players. Sepak-U: Sports Fighting Game features 21 characters, 21 arenas, with over 10 hours of solo/co-op content, minigames, and epic boss battles. Sepak U: Sports Fighting Game, based on the cultural Asian sport Sepak Takraw, will be available on PC in 2027.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Creepshow - Official Announcement Trailer
Check out the Creepshow announcement trailer for this video game adaptation horror anthology series. Creepshow will be available in August 2026 for PC via Steam. 

Inspired by the hit television series executive produced by horror legend Greg Nicotero, the game brings the franchise’s signature blend of wicked scares, twisted humor, and comic-book style dread into a new medium. Developed by PHL with creative direction from Brian Clarke (The Mortuary Assistant), Creepshow embraces the spirit of the beloved anthology franchise through self-contained tales of terror, delivering dramatic gameplay and shocking surprises.

From psychological horror to the blackest of humor, players will step into stories where death is often the least of their worries. Follow Danny and his friends as the search for the truth of what happened to Danny’s father quickly turns dark as they uncover sinister secrets. Fate brings Danny to The Reader, a mysterious fortune-teller, who has a taste for treacherous tales.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Overwatch - Official Shion Gameplay Trailer
Take a look at the Shion Gameplay Trailer for Overwatch, the hit first-person arcade hero shooter developed by Blizzard Entertainment. Players will embody the leader of the Hashimoto as the latest Damage Hero being added to the game, armed with her signature dual semi-auto pistols, an omnidirectional dash, and a throwable motorcycle to keep the pressure up in intense engagements. Shion joins Overwatch with Season 3 on June 16 for PlayStation 4 (PS4), PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, and Nintendo Switch.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Stronghold 4 - Official Announcement Trailer
Take a look at the Stronghold 4 announcement trailer for this upcoming narrative prequel to the original 'castle sim.' Wood needed! Return to the green roots of Stronghold in this RTS city builder game. In Stronghold 4, immerse yourself in a cinematic campaign, hone your siegecraft with new mechanics in skirmish mode, and customize your castles with a wide selection of castle pieces and cosmetics. Stronghold 4 is coming to Early Access.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Disclosure Day - Official Emily Blunt Featurette (2026) Josh O'Connor, Colin Firth
Check out the Emily Blunt Featurette for Disclosure Day, an upcoming sci-fi film created and directed by Steven Spielberg. Disclosure Day stars Emily Blunt (Oppenheimer, A Quiet Place), Josh O’Connor (Challengers, The Crown), Colin Firth (The King’s Speech, Kingsman franchise), Eve Hewson (Bad Sisters, The Perfect Couple), and Colman Domingo (Sing Sing, Rustin). Witness the world come to terms with humans not being alone in the universe in Disclosure Day, in theaters on June 12.

If you found out we weren’t alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you? This summer, the truth belongs to seven billion people. We are coming close to … Disclosure Day. 

Based on a story by Spielberg, the screenplay is by David Koepp. Disclosure Day is produced by Kristie Macosko Krieger (The Fabelmans, West Side Story) and by Spielberg for Amblin Entertainment. The executive producers are Adam Somner and Chris Brigham. 

Disclosure Day opens in theaters June 12.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Ninja Scroll - Official Theatrical Release 4K Restoration Trailer (English Subtitles)
Watch the Ninja Scroll trailer as Iconic Events Releasing and AMC Global Media’s HIDIVE present the new 4K restoration of the samurai film in North American theaters in October 2026. The limited theatrical release of Ninja Scroll 4K will screen on October 4, 5 & 7 across the U.S. and Canada.

When Jubei saves a young ninja woman from the unthinkable, he assumes that’s the end of it. To his surprise, it’s only just the beginning. Together, the two investigate the mysterious deaths of an entire village which uncovers a conspiracy of demonic proportions! Getting closer to the truth, the demonic forces will stop at nothing to silence Jubei and his companion for good! 

Written and directed by Yoshiaki Kawajiri, Ninja Scroll was originally released in 1993 and is now considered a truly seminal work in anime filmmaking. The 4K restoration of Ninja Scroll was produced by AMC Global Media’s Sentai under the supervision of Director Yoshiaki Kawajiri and was screened for this first time earlier this year at its world premiere during the 76th Annual Berlinale international film festival. The digital adaptation was a painstaking restoration and remastering of the movie — a meticulous process that involved a 4K scan (3840 × 2160 pixels) of the original 35mm negative, then repairing any damage and lastly performing color correction to create an archival quality digital master of the film.

Tickets sales day for the Ninja Scroll 4K limited theatrical release will be announced soon with details on when both advance tickets and the official website will launch. Advance tickets will be available via both the official website and participating theater box offices.

#IGN #Anime
